title: Blake Purely Packaging C5 229 x 162 mm Board Back Pocket Peel & Seal Envelopes (5112/25) Manilla - Pack of 25
features: Sturdy and reliable, our board back envelopes keep documents flat and protected in transit, with ‘Do Not Bend’ printed for added security. Perfect for mailing certificates, photos, and important paperwork.
Sealing Type: Peel & Seal | Quick and easy sealing—no need for tape or moisture.
Size: 229 x 162mm | Suitable for C5 uses.
description: From the manufacturer Luxurious Textures The textures of the Creative Senses range pack the envelopes with individuality, with each envelope feeling as good as it looks, from the sensational soft finish of the Velvet Envelopes to the chunky textures of the handmade and felt mark envelopes. Evoke the senses Creative Senses: 'Keep in touch' with our most tactile, stimulating range. This collection comprises an array of different alluring effects and textures, shouting to be noticed. Evoke the senses with this enticing collection, from natural finish and translucent envelopes through to velvet finishes and handmade envelopes. Handmade & Feltmark Envelopes These beautiful envelopes are crafted from handmade paper converted to an envelope by handmade processes, making each envelope as unique as your signature. The deckle edge flaps give each envelope a unique overture Natural Finish Envelopes These envelopes put you in touch with everyday natural surfaces that we often take for granted, reflecting the beauty and uniqueness of their appearance. An envelope with meaning - so natural, so real, so different! Velvet Envelopes Truly Unique and sensational in touch and appearance, these envelopes have a luxurious soft velvet finish. If you want your mailing to touch every sense this has to be the envelope for you! Translucent Envelopes For mailings that need to be noticed, this range of translucent envelopes is designed to do just that. They will captivate your attention, with the see through paper giving an air of individuality to any mailing Envelope Size Guide A4 folded into 4 C6 114 x 162mm A4 folded into 3 DL 110 x 220m A4 folded in half C5 162 x 229mm A4 unfolded C4 324 x 229m
